hero.summary: Fullstack developer with real experience in Madagascar, now studying MIAGE at Université de Lille. I care about architecture, clean code, and building things that last.

about.title: Fullstack Developer
about.subtitle: Université de Lille · Master MIAGE · 2025–2027
about.body1: I'm a fullstack developer with a background in computer science from Madagascar, now completing my Master's in MIAGE at Université de Lille. I build production-grade web applications always focused on clean architecture and software quality.
about.body2: I've had real experience at ARATO where I integrated OpenAI APIs, built secure REST APIs with JWT, and shipped full applications end-to-end. I'm now looking for a 3 to 6 month opportunity with the goal of continuing as an apprentice in M2.

projects.proj1Problem: A biodiversity NGO had thousands of scientific documents with no classification or search system.
projects.proj1Solution: Built a classification module using OpenAI API for semantic analysis + a multi-criteria search engine.
projects.proj1Result: Documents fully indexed and searchable. Automated categorization replaced a fully manual process.
projects.proj2Problem: Tracking student attendance manually across multiple classes and timetables.
projects.proj2Solution: Fullstack app with integrated agenda, REST API backend and reactive UI.
projects.proj3Problem: Order & stock management as separate monoliths with no real-time communication.
projects.proj3Solution: Async communication via Kafka producers/consumers + full Docker containerization.
projects.proj4Solution: Property listing app with visit booking, mailing and a secure JWT API with role management.

contact.subtitle: Architecture & software quality · Goal: alternance M2 · Lille, France
